narrative:
Jackson 33 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,313 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
